examples: They have introduced a new system whereby all employees must undergo regular training.
The two colleges have a reciprocal arrangement whereby students from one college can attend classes at the other.
The company operates an arrangement whereby employees may select any 8-hour period between 6 a.m. to 8 p.m. to go to work.
The author is right, mind keeps on spinning ideas whereby the same can formulate into realities!
Herefordshire Council has launched the system whereby schools add information to the council's website.
